definitions.text: Under normal conditions or circumstances; usually; most of the time
examples: Normally, I eat breakfast at 6am, but today, I got up late and didn't eat until 9.

definitions.text: In the expected or customary manner.
examples: Lisa ate normally, until she realised that she was late for choir, when she sped up.

definitions.text: To a usual or customary extent or degree.
examples: He was abnormally agitated, she only normally so.
